domain: B2B Order Automation SaaS for Wholesale Food Distributors
design_philosophy: Enterprise-grade maturity. Focus on extreme data density, readability, and operational efficiency. Zero ambiguity in states and actions.

primary.name: Dark Navy
primary.usage: Main typography, sidebar backgrounds, primary CTAs.

ai_accent.name: Sapphire / Electric Blue
ai_accent.usage: AI-extracted confidence highlights, AI processing states, 'Sparkle' icons, AI wizard steps.

fonts.display: Cabinet Grotesk or Clash Display (mapped to font-display)
fonts.ui_body: IBM Plex Sans or Inter (mapped to font-sans)

h1_page_title.classes: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-950 font-display

h2_section_title.classes: text-lg sm:text-xl font-medium tracking-tight text-slate-900 font-display
h2_section_title.usage: Panel headers, major sections inside a page.

caption.usage: Helper text, timestamps, secondary table data.

spacing_and_layout.alignment_rules: Always left-align data and text. Center align empty states only.

icons.unification_strategy: Standardize 100% on lucide-react. Mixing Phosphor and Lucide causes visual inconsistency (different stroke widths, corner radii, and viewBoxes). Since shadcn/ui uses Lucide natively, fully migrating to Lucide is the lowest-friction, highest-impact choice for uniformity.
icons.stroke_width: Standardize all icons to strokeWidth={2} or strokeWidth={1.5} for a crisper enterprise look.

variants.primary: bg-slate-950 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-md transition-colors
variants.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm rounded-md

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg overflow-hidden
cards.header: px-6 py-5 border-b border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between

page_header.style: flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-4 mb-8

empty_states.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 text-center bg-white border border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-lg
empty_states.title: text-base font-medium text-slate-900 mb-1 font-display

loading_states.page_level: Use Skeleton loaders matching the exact shape of the missing content (e.g., Table Skeletons). Never use a full-screen spinner.
loading_states.button_level: Replace leading icon with Lucide Loader2 (animate-spin) size-4. Disable button.
loading_states.ai_extraction: Shimmer effect or glowing border (using AI accent color) on the container being processed.

error_states.section: p-4 border border-red-200 bg-red-50 rounded-md flex items-start gap-3 text-sm text-red-800

badges.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

form_fields.input: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:border-transparent transition-all disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

notifications_toasts.style: Rich colors preferred over standard white for enterprise clarity.

variants.success: Green check icon, 'Success' title, clear message.
variants.error: Red alert icon, 'Error' title, actionable resolution message.
variants.ai_action: Sparkles icon, Sapphire Blue theme, used when AI finishes extracting order details.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.

prioritized_action_items: 1. ICON UNIFICATION: Run a mass search-and-replace to swap all Phosphor icons to Lucide-react. This immediately removes the 'demo' feel of mixed icon sets.
2. TYPOGRAPHY AUDIT: Enforce the 'font-display' utility class ONLY on H1/H2/H3 elements and standard 'font-sans' on body/labels. Remove rogue font sizes (e.g., text-7xl in dashboards).
3. SPACING STANDARDIZATION: Replace arbitrary padding/margins with the global spacing system (e.g., p-6 for all cards, gap-8 between page sections).
4. COMPONENT STATE CLEANUP: Implement the standardized Empty State layout for Customers, Orders, and Catalog when data is 0. Add Skeleton loaders for the Orders list.

5. AI HIGHLIGHTING: Audit the 'Order Review' screen to ensure all AI-extracted line items use the 'ai_accent' color systematically (e.g., blue-50 background with blue-700 text) for confidence highlighting, cleanly separating it from standard user-input data.
